title: Fallout Cola
description: Nothing's better than a soda during the world's longest apocalypse!
body:
![The stages of Nuka Cola (Full and closed, Uncapped, Empty, Smashed, and the standalone bottle cap)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ded70577e58a32cdc2d60b0359944b6df917ca4.png)

# Additions (VERSION 1.0.0):

  ### Nuka Cola:
  - Hold right-click to remove the bottle cap
  - Pick up the bottle cap upon removal
  - Drink from the Nuka Cola and make it empty
  - At any point you can smash the bottle against a wall or hit an entity with it
  - Broken Nuka Cola bottles can be used as weapons

![Fallout Cola Guide (Updated V.1.0.0)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31a2054b90652a1cba01c3730cce7fc3e25226fe.png)
  
# To-Be Added
